channel.title: Bluetooth on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Bluetooth on Arrans github.io

item.title: exelban/stats
item.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

item.title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
item.description: Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.

item.title: pythops/bluetui
item.description: 🛜 TUI for managing bluetooth on Linux

item.title: spieglt/FlyingCarpet
item.description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips (and optionally Bluetooth) in close range.
